caption: A woman with blonde hair tied up in a bun stands against a plain, light-colored background, appearing to be in a presentation or speaking setting. She is dressed in a dark blazer over a magenta-colored top. A small microphone is positioned in front of her, and a clear plastic water bottle sits on a surface to her right. The "mediasite" logo is visible in the top left of the scene. Throughout the clip, the woman is speaking and gesturing with her hands. Initially, her hands are clasped in front of her as she looks slightly to her right. She then shifts her posture, raising her right hand with a finger pointed upward to emphasize a point while continuing to look toward the right side of the frame. Finally, she returns to a more neutral stance, looking right with her hands lowered.
